---
title: "Chapter_3_trials_misc"
output: html_document
---

---
title: "PCA"
author: "Daniel Ritchie"
date: "2025-08-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/ADULT_TELO_FULL.csv")
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  mutate(
    Membrane_poten_Jan = MTO_JAN / MTG_JAN,
    Membrane_poten_May = MTO_MAY / MTG_MAY,
    Membrane_poten_Change = (MTO_MAY / MTG_MAY) - (MTO_JAN / MTG_JAN)
  )
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  mutate(
    Superoxide_Jan = MSR_JAN / MTG_JAN,
    Superoxide_May = MSR_MAY / MTG_MAY,
    Superoxide_Change = (MSR_MAY / MTG_MAY) - (MSR_JAN / MTG_JAN),
    Density_Change =(MTG_MAY-MTG_JAN)
  )



# 1. Put Mass + SVL into long format
pictus_long <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, Population,
         Mass_JAN, SVL_JAN,
         Mass_MAY, SVL_MAY) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Mass_JAN, SVL_JAN, Mass_MAY, SVL_MAY),
               names_to = c("Trait", "Month"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)_(JAN|MAY)",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Trait, values_from = Value)

# 2. Calculate BCI per Population × Month
BCI_data <- pictus_long %>%
  mutate(lnMass = log(Mass),
         lnSVL  = log(SVL)) %>%
  group_by(Population, Month) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    df <- .x %>% filter(!is.na(lnMass), !is.na(lnSVL))
    fit <- lm(lnMass ~ lnSVL, data = df)
    df$BCI_raw <- residuals(fit)
    df$BCI <- as.numeric(scale(df$BCI_raw))
    df
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3. Go back to wide format with both raw + standardized residuals
BCI_wide <- BCI_data %>%
   dplyr::select(ID, Population, Month, BCI_raw, BCI) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month,
              values_from = c(BCI_raw, BCI),
              names_sep = "_")

# 4. Join back to main dataset
pictus_ADULT_TELO <- pictus_ADULT_TELO %>%
  left_join(BCI_wide, by = c("ID", "Population"))

## Create D for SVL
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$SVL_JAN       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$SVL_MAY       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_SVL <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_SVL <- D_SVL

## Create D for MASS
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Mass_JAN       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$Mass_MAY       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_Mass <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_Mass <- D_Mass


## Create D for BCI
Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$BCI_JAN      # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$BCI_MAY      # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_BCI <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_BCI <- D_BCI

Xi <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$JAN_RTL       # baseline RTL
X2 <- pictus_ADULT_TELO$MAY_RTL       # follow-up RTL

S1 <- sd(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)
S2 <- sd(X2, na.rm = TRUE)
r <- cor(Xi, X2, use = "complete.obs")
p <- r * S2 / S1
D_RTL <- p * (Xi - mean(Xi, na.rm = TRUE)) - (X2 - mean(X2, na.rm = TRUE))
pictus_ADULT_TELO$D_RTL <- D_RTL

```




```{r}
## IMPORT DATA
pictus_CTMAX <- read_csv("~/Desktop/phd/Documents/Chapter 3/Datasheets/CTmax_DR_2024.csv")
pictus_CTMAX$Treatment <- as.factor(pictus_CTMAX$Treatment)
pictus_CTMAX$Pop <- as.factor(pictus_CTMAX$Pop)
pictus_CTMAX$Pop <- factor(pictus_CTMAX$Pop, levels = c("STURT", "MR", "KNGA", "NRKT"))
pictus_CTMAX$Treatment <- factor(pictus_CTMAX$Treatment, levels = c("Warm", "Cool"))
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

all_traits <- d_params %>%
  mutate(ID = as.character(ID)) %>%
  inner_join(pictus_ADULT_TELO %>% mutate(ID = as.character(ID)), by = "ID") %>%
  inner_join(pictus_CTMAX %>% mutate(ID = as.character(ID)), by = "ID")

```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggfortify)


pca_vars <- all_traits %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, Treatment,Clade, 
              MAY_RTL, MAY, Superoxide_May,Membrane_poten_May, 
         Tgape, Vtmax, Ctmin,     
         topt, rmax, breadth,           
         D_SVL, D_Mass, D_BCI)  

pca_data <- pca_vars %>%
  drop_na()

pca_res <- prcomp(pca_data %>% dplyr::select(-ID, -Treatment, -Clade),
                  center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)


autoplot(pca_res,
         data = pca_data,
         colour = "Treatment",
         shape = "Clade",
         size = 3)

```

```{r}
library(factoextra)
library(dplyr)

pca_data <- pca_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = interaction(Clade, Treatment, sep = "_"))


pca_res <- prcomp(pca_data %>%  dplyr::select(-ID, -Clade, -Treatment, -Group),
                  center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)


fviz_pca_biplot(
  pca_res,
  label = "var",                  
  habillage = pca_data$Group,     
  addEllipses = TRUE,             
  ellipse.level = 0.95,       
  ellipse.type = "norm",          
  repel = TRUE,                  
  col.var = "black"               

```

```{r}
library(brms)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Prepare data in long format for multivariate model
pca_data_long <- all_traits %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, Treatment, Clade, Population,
                MAY_RTL, MAY, Superoxide_May, Membrane_poten_May, 
                Tgape, Vtmax, Ctmin,     
                topt, rmax, breadth,           
                D_SVL, D_Mass, D_BCI) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(MAY_RTL, Superoxide_May, Membrane_poten_May, 
                       Tgape, Vtmax, Ctmin, topt, rmax, breadth,
                       D_SVL, D_Mass, D_BCI),
               names_to = "trait",
               values_to = "value")

# Create the multivariate formula
multi_formula <- bf(
  value ~ 0 + trait + Treatment:trait + Clade:trait + 
          (1 | p | Population) + (1 | id | ID)
)

# Fit the multivariate model
multi_model <- brm(
  multi_formula,
  data = pca_data_long,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4, 
  cores = 4,
  iter = 10000,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 15)
)

# Summary of the model
summary(multi_model)

```


```{r}
summary(multi_model)          # Fixed effects and random effects
    # Residual correlation among traits
```


```{r}
summary(multi_model)$fixed

```
```{r}
 fixef(multi_model)

```

```{r}
cor_resid(multi_model)

```

```{r}
conditional_effects(multi_model, effects = "Treatment:Clade", resp = "MAY")

```

```{r}
library(DiagrammeR)

grViz("
digraph telomere {
  graph [rankdir = LR]

  # Nodes
  CladePop [label = 'Clade / Population', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = lightgrey]
  Treatment [label = 'Treatment\n(Warm / Cool)', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = orange]
  Thermal [label = 'Thermal match\n(topt, breadth, Tgape, VTmax, Ctmin)', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = lightblue]
  Mito [label = 'Mito function\n(Membrane potential)', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = lightgreen]
  ROS [label = 'Oxidative stress\n(Superoxide_May)', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = lightgreen]
  Growth [label = 'Growth & Condition\n(D_SVL, D_Mass, D_BCI)', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = plum]
  TERT [label = 'TERT expression\n(Telomerase)', shape = box, style = filled, fillcolor = gold]
  TL [label = 'Δ Telomere length', shape = ellipse, style = filled, fillcolor = white]

  # Edges
  CladePop -> Treatment
  CladePop -> Thermal
  CladePop -> TERT
  Treatment -> Thermal
  Treatment -> Mito
  Treatment -> TERT
  Thermal -> Mito
  Thermal -> ROS
  Mito -> ROS
  ROS -> TERT
  Mito -> TL
  Growth -> TL
  ROS -> TL
  TERT -> TL
}
")


```
